title: Admin logs in successfully
description: Verifies that an admin can sign in with valid credentials and reach the dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Create a stock transfer draft
description: Verifies that a user can create a stock transfer draft between different warehouses and see it saved with draft status.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select a different source warehouse and destination warehouse
Add a product item and set a quantity within available stock
Save the transfer as a draft
Verify the new transfer is displayed with draft status

title: Admin reaches dashboard KPIs and stock chart
description: Verifies that a logged-in admin can view the dashboard summary cards, activity chart, and low-stock list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify inventory KPI summaries are displayed
Verify stock activity and low-stock information are displayed

title: Create a goods receipt draft
description: Verifies that a warehouse operator can create a goods receipt draft with supplier, warehouse, items, and quantities.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the transaction date field with a valid date
Fill in the reference number field with a unique reference
Set a valid quantity for the item
Save the transaction as a draft
Verify the new receipt appears with draft status
Verify the receipt list is visible

title: Create a stock opname draft
description: Verifies that a user can create a stock opname draft for a warehouse and review loaded item rows before saving.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the add stock opname form
Select a warehouse with stocked items
Adjust one or more physical quantities
Save the stock opname as a draft
Verify the new stock opname is displayed with draft status

title: Create a goods issue draft within available stock
description: Verifies that a warehouse operator can create a goods issue draft with quantities that do not exceed available stock.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the transaction date field with a valid date
Fill in the recipient field with a valid recipient
Set a valid quantity within available stock
Save the transaction as a draft
Verify the new issue appears with draft status
Verify the issue list is visible

title: Complete a draft goods receipt
description: Verifies that a warehouse operator can complete a saved draft receipt and see its status change to completed.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the receipt status changes to completed
Verify the completed receipt remains in the list

title: Complete a draft stock transfer
description: Verifies that a saved draft transfer can be completed and changes to finished status.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the transfer is displayed with completed status

title: Complete a draft stock opname
description: Verifies that a saved draft stock opname can be completed and changes to finished status.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open an existing draft stock opname
Verify the stock opname is displayed with completed status

title: Complete a draft goods issue
description: Verifies that a warehouse operator can complete a saved draft issue and see its status change to completed.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the issue status changes to completed
Verify the completed issue remains in the list

title: Create a new user with a warehouse role
description: This verifies that an administrator can add a new user, assign a role and warehouse, and see the user in the list.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the user profile details with a new user name and email
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Verify the new user appears in the user list

title: User creates a new product with master data and photo
description: Verifies that a user can add a product with category, unit, supplier, warehouse assignment, and a photo, then see it in the product list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the product name field with a unique product name
Fill in the SKU field with a unique SKU
Verify the new product appears in the product list

title: Create a return draft
description: Verifies that a user can create a return draft with item quantities and a reason and see it saved with draft status.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Choose a return type and warehouse
Add an item row and enter a return quantity
Save the return as a draft
Verify the new return is displayed with draft status

title: Complete a draft return
description: Verifies that a saved draft return can be completed and changes to finished status.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the return is displayed with completed status

title: Filter stock mutation report by warehouse
description: Verifies the stock mutation report can be scoped to one warehouse and shows only rows for that warehouse.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the mutation table shows rows for the selected warehouse only

title: Create a minimum stock report view filtered to critical zero-stock items
description: This verifies that a user can open the minimum stock report, filter to critical severity, and see only items with zero stock.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify only zero-stock items are displayed

title: Admin filters dashboard by warehouse and resets the view
description: Verifies that selecting a warehouse updates dashboard statistics and clearing the filter restores the overall view.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the dashboard statistics update for the selected warehouse
Verify the overall dashboard statistics are displayed again

title: Create a category
description: Verifies that a user can add a new product category and see it appear in the categories list.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the category name field with Ops Category A
Fill in the category description field with Temporary test category
Verify the new category appears in the list

title: Filter stock card by product and date range
description: Verifies a user can narrow the stock card to a single product within a selected date range and see the matching history.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill a valid start date into the start date field
Fill a valid end date into the end date field
Verify the stock card table shows the selected product's history within the chosen date range

title: View low-stock notifications
description: An authenticated user can open the low-stock notifications page and see the list of notifications.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for the required role
Click the link to open stock notifications
Verify the low-stock notifications list is displayed

title: Create a supplier
description: Verifies that a user can add a new supplier record and see it appear in the suppliers list.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the supplier name field with Supplier A
Fill in the supplier phone field with a valid phone number
Fill in the supplier email field with supplier-a@example.com
Fill in the supplier address field with Supplier address A
Verify the new supplier appears in the list

title: Filter stock mutation report by product
description: Verifies the stock mutation report can be narrowed to one product and shows only rows for that product.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the mutation table shows rows for the selected product only

title: Create a warehouse record
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can add a new warehouse and see it appear in the warehouse list.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the warehouse name field with Central Warehouse
Fill in the warehouse code field with CW-01
Fill in the warehouse address field with a valid address
Verify the new warehouse appears in the list
Verify the warehouse list remains accessible

title: User finds products by search and filters
description: Verifies that product search and category or supplier filters narrow the list and can be reset to restore the full catalog.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the list shows only matching products
Verify the full product list is displayed again

title: Create a unit
description: Verifies that a user can add a new measurement unit and see it appear in the units list.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the unit name field with Box Unit A
Fill in the unit symbol field with BXA
Verify the new unit appears in the list

title: Filter inventory value by warehouse
description: Verifies selecting a warehouse scopes the inventory value report to that warehouse.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the valuation data is scoped to the selected warehouse

title: Filter inventory value by product SKU
description: Verifies a user can search inventory value by SKU and see matching valuation rows.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the product SKU field with a valid SKU
Verify matching valuation rows are displayed

title: Narrow minimum stock results by category and warehouse
description: This verifies that category and warehouse filters narrow the minimum stock table to matching items.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the table is narrowed to matching items

title: User updates an existing product
description: Verifies that a user can edit an existing product and see the updated record in the table.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the edit form for an existing product
Verify the updated product appears in the product list

title: Review goods receipt details
description: Verifies that a user can open a draft goods receipt and view its transaction details and item list.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open a draft receipt details view
Verify the transaction information is displayed
Verify the item list is displayed

title: Delete a draft stock transfer
description: Verifies that a draft transfer can be deleted and no longer appears in the transfer list.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the transfer is no longer displayed

title: Filter inventory value by category
description: Verifies selecting a category updates the inventory value table to that category's items.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the valuation table is scoped to the selected category

title: Create a new role with assigned permissions
description: This verifies that an administrator can create a custom role and see it stored with its selected permissions.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the new role card appears with assigned permissions

title: Delete a draft stock opname
description: Verifies that a draft stock opname can be deleted and no longer appears in the opname list.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open an existing draft stock opname
Verify the stock opname is no longer displayed

title: Mark a low-stock notification as read
description: An authenticated user can mark a low-stock notification as read and see its state update in the list.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for the required role
Click the link to open stock notifications
Mark one low-stock notification as read
Verify the notification state updates to read

title: Search goods receipts by reference
description: Verifies that a user can search goods receipts by reference and narrow the list to matching transactions.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Enter a transaction reference in the search field
Verify only matching receipts are displayed
Verify the search results remain visible

title: Review stock mutation totals and net change indicators
description: Verifies the stock mutation report surfaces positive and negative net change indicators for reconciliation review.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify positive and negative net change indicators are displayed
Verify the mutation totals are displayed

title: Update an existing user name from search results
description: This verifies that an administrator can find an existing user, edit the name, and see the updated record in the grid.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the edit form for the matching user
Verify the updated user appears in the user list

title: Delete a draft return
description: Verifies that a draft return can be deleted and no longer appears in the return list.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the return is no longer displayed

title: Update an existing warehouse
description: Verifies that a user can edit a warehouse name and see the updated record in the list.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the edit form for an existing warehouse
Verify the updated warehouse row is visible
Verify the warehouse remains in the list

title: View stock opname differences
description: Verifies that opening a stock opname details view shows the differences between system and physical quantities.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open an existing stock opname details view
Verify the quantity differences are displayed

title: Change account password
description: A user can enter the current password, a new password, and confirmation, then save a successful password change.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for the required role
Click the link to open account settings
Verify the password change is accepted

title: User deletes a product from the list
description: Verifies that a user can remove an existing product and no longer see it in the product list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the delete action for an existing product
Verify the product is removed from the product list

title: Show only incoming stock rows in stock card
description: Verifies changing the transaction type filter to incoming stock updates the stock card to show only receipt rows.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select a transaction type of incoming stock
Verify the stock card table shows only incoming stock rows

title: Prevent transfer to the same warehouse
description: Verifies that the transfer form shows a validation warning when the same warehouse is selected as both source and destination.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select the same warehouse as both source and destination
Verify a validation warning is visible

title: Filter and reset warehouse status results
description: Verifies that a user can filter warehouses by status and then reset the filter to restore the full list.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the list updates to reflect the filter
Verify the warehouse list is restored
Verify the searched warehouse is visible again

title: Expand permissions for an existing custom role
description: This verifies that editing a custom role updates the displayed permission summary after additional permissions are saved.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the edit form for an existing custom role
Select additional permissions in the matrix
Verify the role summary reflects the updated permissions

title: Persist read state for a notification
description: An authenticated user can mark a notification as read and later see that it remains marked as read when returning to the notifications page.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for the required role
Click the link to open stock notifications
Mark one low-stock notification as read
Leave the notifications page and return to it
Verify the notification remains marked as read

title: Admin expands and collapses the dashboard sidebar
description: Verifies that the dashboard sidebar can be collapsed and expanded without leaving the page.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the sidebar changes to the collapsed state
Toggle the sidebar collapse control again
Verify the sidebar returns to the expanded state

title: Search and reset category filters
description: Verifies that searching and status filtering updates the categories list and that resetting the filter restores matching results.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the searched category is visible again
